theme_strategy.rationale: Health, wellness, and habit tracking require warmth, calm, and trust. A clinical or overly gamified dark UI induces anxiety. We are optimizing for 'streaks without guilt', so the aesthetic should mimic a mindful physical journal rather than a demanding digital dashboard.

typography.pairing_rationale: Moving away from sterile tech defaults (no Inter/Roboto). An elegant, organic serif paired with a highly legible, warm geometric sans-serif to evoke calm and premium care.

heading.usage: H1, H2, AI Coach messages, prominent numbers (like streaks or water log).

body.usage: General UI, cards, buttons, daily tracking labels.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-forest-900
hierarchy.caption: text-sm font-sans tracking-wide uppercase text-stone-500

color_palette.tailwind_config_instructions: Extend tailwind colors with the exact hex values above under 'stone', 'forest', 'sage', 'terracotta', and 'sand'. Do not use default slate or zinc.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. The app should feel 'quiet'. Never cram elements together.

surface_and_borders.inputs: bg-stone-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-stone-200 focus:border-sage focus:ring-1 focus:ring-sage transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-forest-900 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-forest-800 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-forest-900 rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-stone-200 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 rounded-full px-4 py-2 hover:bg-stone-100 transition-colors

habit_grid.style: Soft, rounded rectangular cards. When completed, background changes from paper (white) to soft sage, border becomes transparent.
habit_grid.interaction: One-tap state toggle. Gentle scale down on press (active:scale-95).

water_log.layout: Circular progress ring (stroke-sage, track-stone-100) with bold Fraunces number in center.
water_log.actions: Big pill buttons (+250ml, +500ml) placed ergonomically for thumb reach on mobile.

ai_coach.chat_interface: Bubble styles: User (bg-stone-100, text-primary), AI Coach (bg-sand/30, text-primary).
ai_coach.model_routing: A soft 3-segment toggle switch at the top. Quick Tip (1 credit), Daily Plan (2 credits), Deep Coaching (5 credits).
ai_coach.credit_display: Minimalist pill in the header: '✦ 42 credits'.

smart_reminders.actions: Three buttons side-by-side: Done (primary solid), Snooze (secondary soft), Skip (ghost). No guilt framing.

streaks.style: No flames. No aggressive red. Use a soft terracotta badge or text. Wording should be 'You are on a 5-day flow' instead of 'Don't break the streak!'

health_integrations.style: Simple list of providers (Apple HealthKit, Google Health Connect) with clean toggle switches. Mocked state should look fully integrated.

icons.style: Set strokeWidth to 1.5 to keep them light, elegant, and non-intrusive.

hero_onboarding.description: Person stretching in bed with white sheets, minimal morning vibe.

habit_water.description: Clear glass of water on a bench, illuminated by sunlight.

morning_routine.description: White ceramic mug bathed in warm sunlight.

ai_coach_background.description: Peaceful close-up of white sand dunes for abstract, non-intrusive backdrop.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='water-add-250-button', data-testid='streak-count-text').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard Shadcn slate/zinc colors. Use the fonts and hex codes provided here.
Make sure the Shadcn config uses `.js` files if extending components, rather than relying strictly on TS if the environment is pure JS.
The UI should feel more like a high-end editorial website than a rigid dashboard. Use generous padding, rounded corners, and soft typography.
Do not use placeholder images or fake image services. ONLY use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Mock the Apple HealthKit and Google Health Connect integrations visually, with toggle switches in the settings.
Ensure the app is fully mobile-responsive (PWA style). Essential actions should be reachable via thumb on mobile.
Build the Razorpay checkout view using the 'subscription & credits' page flow as specified in the prompt.
